title: missing-api-keys-broad-persona-outage-continued
description:
This is a continuation of missing-api-keys-broad-persona-outage. Since at least 2026-05-30T03:13:48Z, the factory has continued to dispatch persona runs that fail immediately with the explicit infrastructure error "No API key available". The failures remain broad across many stories and now clearly span multiple personas and providers in the same window: repeated `dev` failures on `deepseek/deepseek-coder` and `onboarder` failures on `anthropic/claude-opus-4-7`.

The downstream effect is widespread blocked work rather than token burn: failed runs have `duration_s` 0.0 and `cost_usd` 0.0, but many stories are repeatedly retried without making persona-level progress. Retry behavior is visible across numerous story/persona pairs, including both long-running existing stories and newly entered stories. Queue snapshots remain heavily concentrated in `tests_red` (30/40 to 33/42 in this window), but ticks continue to complete successfully and still advance stories, so this is not yet a full scheduler stall.

The evidence points to a factory-side credential/configuration outage rather than story-specific defects. The error text itself names the missing key condition and lists relevant environment variables, and the same failure class appears across different models/providers. In parallel, worktree creation continues and the watcher reports severe worktree drift, but that appears adjacent to the credential outage rather than sufficient on its own to explain the immediate run failures.

evidence.summary_excerpt: The broad credential outage escalated in the prior note continued through this window: many persona runs across many stories failed immediately with explicit "No API key available" errors...

evidence.excerpt: story 20 dev failed immediately on deepseek/deepseek-coder: "No API key available for model 'deepseek/deepseek-coder'..." attempt_n=11 cost_usd=0.0 duration_s=0.0
story 48 onboarder failed immediately on anthropic/claude-opus-4-7: "No API key available for model 'anthropic/claude-opus-4-7'..." attempt_n=3 cost_usd=0.0 duration_s=0.0
story 47 dev failed immediately on deepseek/deepseek-coder: "No API key available for model 'deepseek/deepseek-coder'..." attempt_n=4 cost_usd=0.0 duration_s=0.0

{"noteworthy":"Many per-story dev retry storms are active at once, with numerous story/persona groups at 4-5 failures, consistent with the ongoing credential outage rather than isolated story issues."}
{"noteworthy":"Latest queue snapshot is still heavily concentrated in tests_red (30/42, 71%), but prior notes showed active movement rather than a clear stall."}
{"noteworthy":"Worktree drift is severe: 28 on-disk worktrees now point to story IDs missing from the DB, up sharply from the prior note's already-bad state."}

escalation_reason: Broad missing-API-key outage is continuing across multiple watcher-note intervals and now spans multiple personas/providers (`deepseek` dev and `anthropic` onboarder) from at least 2026-05-30T03:13:38Z through this window. L3 judgment is needed because the failure class is explicit, factory-attributable credential/configuration infrastructure, and it is causing widespread immediate failures and retry storms across many stories even though ticks still complete.
